name: claw3d
description: Unified 3D workflow: create models (AI), search (Thingiverse), slice, and print. Modular—enable only what you need.

ai-forger.label: AI model creation
ai-forger.description: Create 3D models from images/text, edit existing GLBs (FAL.ai)

printing.label: Printer control
printing.description: Print to Moonraker, PrusaLink, or Bambu Lab; manage printers

mesh-repair.label: Mesh repair & conversion
mesh-repair.description: Fix scans, repair meshes, simplify polygons, convert formats (admesh, trimesh, pymeshlab)
